hero.title: Overview
hero.lede: Latest events and status for your applications.

today.footNotSynced: Google Calendar not synced. Showing only Jobbliggaren events.

notices.title: Notices
notices.emptyBody: The inbox is empty. You will be notified as soon as something happens in your case.
notices.followUpText: You have {count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}} that have not had a response in over 14 days. Consider getting in touch.
notices.deadlineText: {count, plural, one {# saved job ad} other {# saved job ads}} have an application deadline this week ({labels}).
notices.setupText: You have not specified which occupations you are looking for. Set this up to see how well job ads match your profile.
notices.matchText: There are {count, number} job ads that match your profile.
notices.matchTextZero: There are no job ads that match your profile right now.
notices.savedSearchText: {name} has {count, plural, one {# new hit} other {# new hits}} since your last run.

relativeTime.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
